objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=50)
- adx(period=21)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 25
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 25
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.5
tp_atr_mult: 3.5
description: ATR stop-loss (1.5x) and take-profit (3.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.error: Dataset insuffisant pour Builder: 2 barres (< 300) sur ATOMUSDC/15m.
